text: **Anna:** Hello, it's Anna.
**Anna:** I did it!
**Anna:** Washington, D.
**Anna:** C.
**Anna:** is my home.
**Anna:** {Looking|振り返る/見つめる} back over the past {year|年/一年間}, I've done so many {amazing|驚くべき} things.
**Anna:** I have met {people|人々} from all over the world.
**Anna:** I've made many good friends.
**Anna:** And I have a great {job|仕事}.
**Anna:** And I've taken a lot of {chances|機会/チャンス}.
**Anna:** And now I have some really big news.
**Anna:** Wait for it.
**Anna:** And three, two, one.
**Kelly:** Hello and {welcome|歓迎/ようこそ} to Around the Corner and Across the Street from the Actors Studio.
**Kelly:** Many {people|人々} dream of becoming {actors|俳優}, but very often those dreams don't come true.
**Kelly:** Well, today we will meet a woman and her acting {career|キャリア/職業} has really taken off.
**Anna:** In fact, she acted in my {play|演劇/劇}.
**Anna:** The Woods Are Alive!
**Anna:** Oh, she really {brought|もたらす/演じる} the part of tree number 15 to life.
**Anna:** Let's give a warm {welcome|歓迎/ようこそ} to Anna Matteo.
**Anna:** Thank you.
**Anna:** Thank you so much for having me here.
**Kelly:** Please please sit down here here let me help you Thanks Thanks
**Anna:** Wow, it is great to see you again, {Director|監督} Kelly.
**Kelly:** It's great to see you too, Anna.
**Kelly:** I see you are still wearing your tree {costume|衣装}.
**Kelly:** Does this have anything to do with your big news?
**Anna:** Yes.
**Anna:** Yes, it does.
**Kelly:** Well, Anna, please share that news with us.
**Anna:** Kelly, I will be {acting|演技する/出演する} in three {movies|映画/動画}.
**Kelly:** That is amazing!
**Kelly:** Anna, tell us more.
**Anna:** Well, the first is a {science fiction|SF/科学fiction} movie.
**Anna:** The second is a {romantic|ロマンチックな} comedy.
**Anna:** And the third is an {action|行動の/アクションの} movie.
**Kelly:** That is so great.
**Kelly:** Let me guess.
**Kelly:** You're playing a {tree|木} in all of them.
**Anna:** Yes.
**Anna:** This is what happened.
**Anna:** To {prepare|準備する/用意する} for your play, I had to find out what it was like to be a tree in the world.
**Anna:** I had to find out where to eat, where to shop, where to meet people, and how to get around the {city|都市}.
**Anna:** Amazing.
**Kelly:** I think big things are going to happen for you, Anna.
**Kelly:** So tell me, will you be {moving|移動する/引っ越す} to {Hollywood|ハリウッド} for a career in movies?
**Anna:** No.
**Anna:** I'll make the movies and then come back.
**Anna:** Washington, D.
**Anna:** C.
**Anna:** is my home.
**Kelly:** I'm sure your family is very proud.
**Anna:** Yes, they are.
**Anna:** You know, Kelly, not too long ago, I didn't feel very good about my life
**Anna:** I had to make a {change|変化/変更}.
**Anna:** So I took some {chances|機会/チャンス}.
**Anna:** Sometimes I {succeeded|成功した}, sometimes I failed, but I will never stop trying.
**Kelly:** Well, thank you for sharing your news and so much more with us, Anna.
**Kelly:** Until next time.
**Kelly:** Bye, see ya until next time.
